dict.string: ⌘ New private Safari window in current space {query}
⌘ Copy the URL using Markdown format
Open windows, switch tabs, browse history, and manage Safari profiles.
Open Safari window in current space {query}

#!/bin/zsh
/usr/bin/sqlite3 \ "${HOME}/Library/Safari/History.db" \ ".parameter set :max_items '${max_items}'" \ "SELECT JSON_OBJECT( 'cache', JSON_OBJECT('seconds', 5, 'loosereload', true), 'items', JSON_GROUP_ARRAY( JSON_OBJECT( 'title', IIF(title IS NULL OR title IS '', url, title), 'subtitle', url, 'autocomplete', IIF(title IS NULL OR title IS '', url, title), 'match', title || ' ' || url, 'arg', url, 'quicklookurl', url, 'mods', JSON_OBJECT( 'cmd', JSON_OBJECT( 'subtitle', '⌘ Copy URL to clipboard' ), 'alt', JSON_OBJECT( 'subtitle', '⌥ Edit URL' ), 'cmd+shift', JSON_OBJECT( 'subtitle', '⇧⌘ Copy markdown URL to clipboard', 'arg', JSON_OBJECT('url', url, 'title', IIF(title IS NULL OR title IS '', url, title)) ) ) ) ) ) AS JSON_RESULT FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT url, title FROM history_items INNER JOIN history_visits ON history_visits.history_item = history_items.id ORDER BY visit_time DESC LIMIT (:max_items * 100) )"

[{"title":"{var:profile1}","arg":"p1","subtitle":"Open Safari window in {var:profile1}"},{"title":"{var:profile2}","arg":"p2","subtitle":"Open Safari window in {var:profile2}"},{"title":"{var:profile3}","arg":"p3","subtitle":"Open Safari window in {var:profile3}"},{"title":"{var:profile4}","arg":"p4","subtitle":"Open Safari window in {var:profile5}"},{"title":"{var:profile5}","arg":"p5","subtitle":"Open Safari window in {var:profile5}"}]
List the profile to open new window
Open current tab in private window
Copy the URL of the tab in focus to your clipboard

# Safari Control | Alfred Workflow
## Usage
### New window (`sw`) - Opens a new Safari window in the current space. - `⌘` + `↩` opens a new private window. - Examples: - `sw`: Opens a new window. - `sw x3`: Opens 3 new windows. - `sw URL`: Opens a window with the specified URL.
### Copy current tab URL (`swu`) - Copies the URL of the currently focused Safari tab to your clipboard. - Keyword: `swu` - Actions - `⇧` + `⌘` Copy the URL using Markdown format.
### Open current tab in private mode (`stp`) - Opens the current tab in a new private browsing window. - Keyword: `stp` - `⌘` + `↩` also closes the tab in the normal window.
### List Safari tabs (`swt`) - Lists all open Safari tabs, searchable by title or URL. - Keyword: `swt` - Actions: - `⌘` + `↩`: Copy tab URL - `⇧` `⌘` Copy the MD URL. - `⌃` + `↩`: Close tab - `⌥` + `↩`: Modify URL
### List Safari history (`shi`) - Browse and search your recent Safari history by title or URL. - Keyword: `shi` - Actions: - `↩`: Open history item - `⌘` + `↩`: Copy URL - `⇧` `⌘` Copy the MD URL. - `⌥` + `↩`: Modify URL
### Open Safari window profiles (`swp`) - List and open Safari windows using up to 5 customizable profiles (work, personal, etc). - Examples: - `swp`: Lists available profiles. - `sw p1`: Opens a window with Profile 1. - `sw p2`: Opens a window with Profile 2. - `sw p3`: Opens a window with Profile 3.
**Note:** Profiles without assigned names in Alfred will not appear in the list.
---
Created by **Pedro Vázquez** (vanstrouble).
Copy the URL of the currently active Safari tab to the clipboard.
Reopen the current Safari tab in a new private browsing window.
Browse and switch between all open Safari tabs.
Browse and open recently visited Safari pages.
Set how many Safari history items are shown. 100 items per step.
Open Safari windows using specific profiles.
Set a custom name for Safari profile 1.
Set a custom name for Safari profile 2.
Set a custom name for Safari profile 3.
Set a custom name for Safari profile 4.
Set a custom name for Safari profile 5.
